hero.label: Pricing
hero.title: Car inspection cost
hero.subtitle: How much does a car inspection cost in Lithuania? See our prices. No hidden fees.

card1.title: OBD computer diagnostics
card1.text: OBD error code reading, engine and system condition check. Suitable for diesel, petrol, hybrid and electric vehicles.

card2.title: Full pre-purchase car inspection
card2.text: Comprehensive vehicle inspection: body with paint thickness measurement, engine, suspension, OBD diagnostics, mileage analysis, test drive. Documented report with photos.

travel.title: Travel fee
travel.text: No extra charge within Kaunas city and district. A travel fee applies outside the Kaunas area, agreed in advance.

cta.title: Ready to book?
cta.text: Get in touch and we'll arrange the time and place.
